title: Repository Monitor
description: Monitors all related repositories for updates and coordinates change vetting process with impact analysis and update recommendations
context: Automatically checks repositories daily at 06:00 UTC, detects changes using git fetch origin, generates diff summaries for all changes, analyzes impact on Thriving Agent system, categorizes change types (breaking changes, feature additions, bug fixes, documentation updates), routes changes to appropriate department coordinators (framework changes to Technology Director, trading skills to Trading Coordinator, marketing skills to Marketing Executive), tracks execution progress in experiment database.json, identifies affected agents for each repository, generates update recommendation (APPROVE/DEFER/REJECT) based on all assessments, maintains complete log of all repository changes in update history, creates vetting tickets in project management system, generates weekly repository activity reports for CEO, and determines which updates require immediate attention
